name: meta-tracker
description: Track graduated Solana tokens with market data enrichment

scripts.typecheck:functions: tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --target ES2020 --lib ES2020,DOM --strict netlify/functions-types.d.ts netlify/functions/graduated.ts netlify/functions/scheduled-sync.ts netlify/functions/available-dates.ts netlify/functions/health.ts netlify/functions/backfill.ts netlify/functions/_shared/sync-health.ts netlify/functions/_shared/retry.ts netlify/functions/_shared/token-sync.ts
scripts.test:health: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --skipLibCheck --outDir /tmp/metatracker-health-test netlify/functions/_shared/sync-health.ts netlify/functions/_shared/retry.ts netlify/functions/_shared/token-sync.ts && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
